---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If it's a new feature, how might it fit the kit's
modular pattern (see `CLAUDE.md` → "How to add a modular feature")?

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've already ruled out, and why.
